lines.hearsay: Money changed hands at {place}, in front of everyone, and the room went quiet for it.
lines.gossip: {B} put the axe money in {A}'s hand at {place} without being asked once — {A} counted it, because {A} counts everything, and then bought {B} the drink {B} could not have afforded.
lines.report: {B} discharged the outstanding debt to {A} in full at {place}, slot {slot}.
